title: stanleyella texana
intro: Stanleyella texana, also known as Texas star, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the south-central United States. The medicinal properties of Stanleyella texana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Stanleyella texana often involve making teas, infusions, and tinctures from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
